character.definition: (same as 姒) wife of one's husband's elder brother; (in ancient China) the elder of twins; a Chinese family name, (same as 姬) a handsome girl; a charming girl; a concubine; a Chinese family name
Diemyctylus pyrrhogaster, a kind of amphibious reptile, a kind of spider; a fly-eating spider
(non-classical) a lot; a ticket, to draw lots
room, home, house, chamber; 13th lunar mansion, determinative star α Pegasi (Markab)
a grain of rice; rice gruel mixed with meat
(same as 丘) a hill; elder; empty; a name
